name: Orb of Corrosion
description:
Passive: Corrosion

Your attacks reduce the target's armor by %corruption_armor%, slows their movement by %slow_ranged%%% (%slow_melee%%% against melee targets), and reduces Health Restoration by %heal_reduction%%%. Lasts for %duration% seconds.
notes: Armor reduction does not stack with its components, Desolator, or Stygian Desolator.
lore: Seepage from the wounds of a warrior deity, sealed in an arcanist's orb following a campaign of vicious slaughter.
